certified.label: 认证翻译
certified.desc: 翻译由合格译员审核、签字，并加盖WPO印章。不含公证。

notarization.label: 认证翻译（含公证）
notarization.desc: 翻译由译员审核、签字，加盖WPO印章，随后转交合作公证机构对译员签名进行公证。

notary.citiesNotConfigured: 公证服务暂未在您所在地区提供，请联系我们了解情况。

urgency.sameDayHint: 当日办理须在阿拉木图时间12:00前上传并付款。12:00后加收50%；18:00后加收2倍夜间费用。

urgency.notaryCutoffPassed: 公证截止时间已过，报价无效。请重新上传以获取新报价。
urgency.standardHint: Standard notarization is completed on the next business day for documents uploaded and paid after 12:00 Almaty time. If uploaded before 12:00, same-day completion may be possible subject to translator/notary availability.
